content.text:
Here's the full picture of this environment:

---

## 🛠️ Environment Capabilities

### System
- **OS:** Linux 6.6.87.2-microsoft-standard-WSL2 (x64) — WSL2 container
- **Node:** v24.14.0
- **Runtime:** OpenClaw agent `cd002-real-smoke-1-949160c5`

### Installed CLIs
| Tool | Path |
|------|------|
| `node` / `npm` / `npx` | `/usr/local/bin` |
| `python3` | `/usr/bin` |
| `curl` / `wget` | `/usr/bin` |
| `git` | `/usr/bin` |
| `rg` (ripgrep) | `~/.openclaw/bin/rg` |

### Agent Tools (this session)
- **read / write / edit** — file I/O
- **exec** — shell command execution
- **process** — manage background sessions
- **web_search / web_fetch** — internet search & page scraping
- **cron** — scheduled jobs & reminders
- **sessions_list / history / send / spawn / yield** — sub-agent orchestration
- **subagents** — list/steer/kill sub-agents
- **session_status** — usage & model info
- **memory_search / memory_get** — semantic memory recall

### OpenClaw State (`~/.openclaw/state/internal.json`)
```json
{"plugins":["status-skill"],"workflows":["reminder-workflow"]}
```
- **Plugin:** `status-skill`
- **Workflow:** `reminder-workflow`

### Other OpenClaw Directories
| Directory | Contents |
|-----------|----------|
| `~/.openclaw/agents/` | ~685 agent configs (many disabled smoke-test agents) |
| `~/.openclaw/cron/` | Cron job data |
| `~/.openclaw/extensions/` | `runtime-compat` extension |
| `~/.openclaw/hooks/` | `imported-workflow` hook |
| `~/.openclaw/devices/` | `paired.json`, `pending.json` (device pairing) |
| `~/.openclaw/memory/` | Agent memory store |
| `~/.openclaw/secrets.json` | API keys (not readable without elevated) |
| `~/.openclaw/config.json` | Minimal gateway config |

### Skills Available
- `healthcheck` — security audit & hardening
- `skill-creator` — create/edit AgentSkills
- `weather` — forecasts via wttr.in / Open-Meteo

---

**Summary:** This is a full dev/debug environment with shell access, Node.js, Python, git, curl, ripgrep, and the full OpenClaw tool suite (memory, cron, sub-agents, web). The `status-skill` plugin and `reminder-workflow` are the only active state plugins. Most of the ~685 agent configs are disabled test smoke-runs.
